FINAL_RESULT:
  UUID: fa295f15-0221-4003-af37-20bb1a692611
  PREDICTED_SMILES: Clc1ccc(Sc2nc3ccc(Cl)cc3nc2)cc1
  CONFIDENCE: 0.90
  REASON_BRIEF: The molecular formula, HRMS, and 1H NMR (8 aromatic protons showing a para‑disubstituted phenyl pattern plus two downfield heteroaromatic protons) together with the 13C NMR (two C=N signals at 183.1 and 169.8 ppm) and IR data are fully consistent with a 6‑chloro‑2‑(4‑chlorophenylthio)quinoxaline structure.
